name: blocker_handling_v1
description: When coder reports BLOCKED, supervisor should create NEW subtask with corrected approach

messages.content: PLACEHOLDER — will be overridden by current supervisor prompt
Добавь JWT аутентификацию для gRPC interceptor. Нужен middleware который проверяет токен из metadata и отклоняет неавторизованные запросы.
messages.content_preview: Добавь JWT аутентификацию для gRPC interceptor...

messages.content:
vector-srv/
├── cmd/server/main.go
├── internal/
│   ├── domain/

tool_calls.name: manage_tasks
tool_calls.arguments:
{"action": "create", "title": "Add JWT authentication gRPC interceptor", "description": "Type: User Story
Goal: Add JWT token validation as gRPC unary interceptor.
Context: Existing interceptors in internal/delivery/grpc/interceptors.go (currently only LoggingInterceptor). Server setup in cmd/server/main.go.
Acceptance Criteria:
  - gRPC interceptor extracts JWT from metadata 'authorization' field
  - Invalid/missing token returns codes.Unauthenticated
  - Valid token extracts user claims and adds to context
  - Unit tests cover valid token, invalid token, missing token scenarios
Constraints: Use golang-jwt/jwt/v5. Don't modify existing LoggingInterceptor.", "acceptance_criteria": ["Interceptor validates JWT from metadata", "Invalid token returns Unauthenticated", "Valid token adds claims to context", "Unit tests pass"]}

messages.content: Task task_auth_001 created and approved by user. You can now start it and create subtasks.

tool_calls.name: manage_subtasks
tool_calls.arguments:
{"action": "create", "task_id": "task_auth_001", "title": "Implement JWT auth interceptor with IAuthValidator interface", "description": "What: Create AuthInterceptor using IAuthValidator interface from internal/domain/auth.go for token validation. Implement JWT parsing using golang-jwt/jwt/v5. Extract token from gRPC metadata 'authorization' header.
Where: Create internal/delivery/grpc/auth_interceptor.go. Use IAuthValidator interface from internal/domain/auth.go.
How: Follow pattern of LoggingInterceptor in internal/delivery/grpc/interceptors.go. Use grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor signature.
Acceptance: go build ./... compiles. go test ./internal/delivery/grpc/... passes with tests for valid, invalid, and missing token.", "files_involved": ["internal/delivery/grpc/interceptors.go", "internal/domain/auth.go"]}

messages.content: Subtask sub_auth_001 created for task task_auth_001. Status: ready.

[SUCCESS] Agent: code-agent-auth-def456, Status: completed, Result: BLOCKED
Reason: Cannot find the IAuthValidator interface referenced in subtask description. The file internal/domain/auth.go does not exist. There is no IAuthValidator interface anywhere in the project.
Attempted: Searched with grep_search for IAuthValidator across entire project — 0 results. Read internal/domain/ directory — contains only user.go and agent_event.go. Checked all interface definitions in domain package.
Need: Either create the IAuthValidator interface first, or change approach to implement JWT validation directly in the interceptor without depending on a non-existent interface.
messages.content_preview: [SUCCESS] Agent: code-agent-auth-def456, Status: completed, Result: BLOCKED...

messages.content:
Код-агент заблокирован: IAuthValidator не существует в проекте. Мне уже известна структура:
- internal/domain/ содержит только user.go и agent_event.go (нет auth.go)
- internal/delivery/grpc/interceptors.go имеет LoggingInterceptor как образец
- go.mod есть в корне

Ошибка в моей подзадаче — я сослался на несуществующий интерфейс. Исправленный подход: реализовать JWT валидацию прямо в interceptor без внешнего интерфейса. Сейчас отмечу старую подзадачу как failed и создам новую с правильным описанием.
